values.title: Be curious
values.description: I ask questions to get to the 'why'. I aim to understand the root of a problem before trying to design a solution.

values.title: Practice empathy
values.description: I seek to deeply understand and internalize the emotions, motivations, and challenges of users as if they were my own.

values.title: Just be frank
values.description: I aim for transparency. I prefer clear, direct and respectful communication. I admit and own my mistakes.

values.title: Own it!
values.description: I move things forward any way that I can. No task is too small or too large.

values.title: Keep it simple
values.description: I seek to reduce complexity wherever possible. Sometimes the most elegant solutions are often the most simple.
